issue_summary: fixed numerous checkstyle warnings (javadoc, trailing spaces, tabs, parenthesis, declaration order ...)

         * Find the minimum of the function {@code f(p + alpha * d)}.
         *
         * @param p Starting point.

javadoc_after:

         * Find the minimum of the function {@code f(p + alpha * d)}.
